title: BatonMOD
body:
![BatonMOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6641fa3499b750fd69c1a50a53c82f2e0f2be85.png)

### BatonMOD is a mod that adds many new things to the game such as
- Sausage
- New ores
- New Blocks
- Fridge

# How to install

- Add 1.20.1 Version to your Minecraft Launcher

- Download [Fabric Installer](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/), Open the JAR file and in the window that appears, select "Install for Client" and select version 1.20.1 After that, click install. Go to your Minecraft launcher and you will see Fabric Loader 1.20.1. After that, Go to your desktop, press Win+R and in the window that appears, enter %APPDATA%. Find the .minecraft folder in it find the Mods folder. Download [the latest version of BatonMOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/batonmod/versions) and place the JAR file in the mods folder.

- if you already have mods in your mods folder, create a new folder in your mods folder and put everything you have in your mods folder in there except BatonMOD.
- Run Fabric Loader.

**My First Mod
(MCreator)**
